instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: The class website
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Our teacher wants us to create a simple website for our class. [1]Do you think we should include photos of school trips?[/1]||[2]Can you write a short introduction for the home page?[/2]||[3]What colour should the website be?[/3]||[4]Should we ask the teacher before we put students’ photos online?[/4]||Write soon||Oscar

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Oscar,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I think we should include photos of school trips because they will make the website more interesting.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t write the introduction today because I have a lot of homework. I can do it tomorrow evening.[/2]||[3]I think the website should be blue because it looks calm and it is our school colour.[/3]||[4]Yes, we should definitely ask the teacher before putting students’ photos online because it is important to be careful.[/4]||I can help with photos too.||See you soon,||Eva
